title: IPZ-389 Fucked in front of her husband ● Yu Namiki
overview: "Hitomi" is a full-time housewife who leads a happy marriage with her husband. For my husband who is about to have a birthday, I often go to the cooking class and hone my cooking skills. One day, "Hitomi" who participated in the special course resists the instructor "Tsutsui" but is violated without power. I was frightened by the repetitive prejudice of the perverted and obsessive "Tsutsui", but I felt the evil lust that slept in me ... you ... I'm sorry ...
